label: Mold reported and not repaired
query: tenant reported mold and landlord failed to repair
expectation: Should return habitability decisions with conclusions and findings support.

label: Lockout after repairs complaint
query: tenant was locked out after asking for repairs
expectation: Should surface wrongful-eviction or lockout decisions rather than generic repair cases.

label: Owner move-in with no follow through
query: owner move in notice but owner never moved in
expectation: Should find owner-move-in follow-through decisions, not generic occupancy references.

label: Buyout pressure
query: tenant accepted a buyout after pressure from landlord
expectation: Should surface buyout-related decisions rather than generic capital-improvement matters.

label: Roommate replacement denial
expectation: Should return roommate replacement / denial decisions with useful findings support.

label: Service animal accommodation
query: tenant requested a reasonable accommodation for a service animal
expectation: Should return accommodation decisions and avoid generic pet-policy drift.

label: Section 8 unlawful detainer
expectation: Should return section 8 / UD decisions, not substring matches on unrelated section numbers.

label: Construction noise and dust
query: construction noise and dust affecting the unit
expectation: Should return nuisance / housing-services decisions with factual support.

label: Notice of violation and abatement
query: notice of violation and abatement hearing
expectation: Should surface notice / abatement decisions rather than broad citation matches.

label: Excessive heat and sleep
query: excessive heat made it hard to sleep
expectation: Should return excessive-heat habitability decisions with findings support.
